meta-description: Learn about Gold health plans by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Gold health plan
excerpt: One of 4 health plan categories (or “metal levels”) in the Health Insurance Marketplace®. Gold plans usually have higher monthly premiums but lower costs when you get care. Gold may be a good choice if you use a lot of medical services or would rather pay more up front and know that you’ll pay less when you get care.
content:
One of 4 health plan categories (or “metal levels”) in the Health Insurance Marketplace®. Gold plans usually have higher monthly premiums but lower costs when you get care. Gold may be a good choice if you use a lot of medical services or would rather pay more up front and know that you’ll pay less when you get care.
